TODO_DB.description: D1 database that stores quests, completion state, priorities, emojis, and R2 attachment metadata.

TODO_KV.description: KV namespace that stores the selected theme and daily quest-board vibe.

TODO_BUCKET.description: R2 bucket that stores optional todo attachments, also known as quest loot.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Secret token for the protected `/api/admin/stats` endpoint. Use a random string.
